channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Apple Unifies Email Domains for Privacy Features
item.description: Apple will soon implement a shared domain for private email addresses from Sign in with Apple and iCloud+ Hide My Email. This aims to enhance user privacy and streamline services.

item.title: Siri Transformed: iOS 27's AI Overhaul
item.description: iOS 27 introduces a complete redesign of Siri, now featuring advanced AI capabilities. Apple enhances functionality and user experience with this significant update.

item.title: Google Earth Launches Flight Simulator in Browsers
item.description: Google Earth now offers a flight simulator accessible directly in browsers, eliminating the need for downloads. Users can explore the globe virtually with ease.

item.title: Microsoft Partners for Flexible Xbox Payments
item.description: Microsoft plans to allow Xbox customers to split purchases into interest-free installments through Klarna and PayPal. This aims to ease financial burdens amid rising costs.

item.title: Final Fantasy Franchise Sale on Steam
item.description: Steam is hosting a massive sale on the Final Fantasy franchise, including FF7 Remake and Rebirth. Gamers can enjoy hundreds of hours of RPG content at discounted prices.

item.title: Sony Aims for God of War Laufey Release in 2027
item.description: Sony expresses hopes to launch PS5's God of War Laufey in early 2027, though plans may change. Development continues amid fan anticipation.

item.title: Bungie Near Shutdown Before Sony Acquisition
item.description: A former Bungie employee reveals the studio was close to shutting down before Sony's acquisition. The future of Destiny 2 was uncertain during this period.

item.title: Mistfall Hunter Free on Xbox for a Week
item.description: Mistfall Hunter is available for free on Xbox for one week ahead of its Game Pass release in July. Players can try the new PvPvE extraction ARPG now.

item.title: Old Pixel Phones Repurposed as Data Centers
item.description: Researchers are converting old Pixel phones into a data center, outperforming some traditional server hardware. This project addresses electronic waste and sustainability.
